name: Creamy Tomato Bisque with Lump Crabmeat and Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 cup half and half, or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and cut "x" in the bottom of tomatoes. Plunge into boiling water for 20 to 30 seconds or until the skin begins to peel back. Plunge into ice water. Peel the tomatoes; cut into halves. Seed and coarsely chop the tomatoes. Set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large, heavy saucepan. Add onions and garlic. Cook for 5 minutes or until transparent.
3. Add flour and whisk over low heat for 3 to 5 minutes. Do not brown.
4. Whisk in chicken broth, removing all lumps. Stir in 1/2 cup fresh basil. Heat the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer and cook for 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Whisk in tomato sauce, tomato juice, and the reserved chopped tomatoes. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Skim froth from the top as it forms with a large spoon.
7. Whisk in cream; heat until it reaches a simmer. Skim again if necessary.
8. Add sugar and season with salt and white pepper to taste.
9. Ladle into warm cups or bowls and garnish with remaining basil and fresh crabmeat, if desired.
